creator: rannumgen@globaleyes.net
text:
The current development version of Bluefish-1.3.7 (2009 - September 21) provides some very nice new features such
as begin-end tag marking, text block folding, "tool tips" for (some) language tags/constructs,  inline spell checking, and other tools (join/split line, tabs<-->spaces, etc.) that I haven't tested yet.

Since Bluefish.org states that the "latest stable version is Bluefish 1.0.7", FBSD currently offers only V1.0.7 of Bluefish.

Consequently, since the above mentioned improvments are very useful and indeed important, I would suggest that a
"bluefish-devel" port be created. Indeed - all I made were a couple of cosmetic changes to the current FBSD Bluefish
Makefile, and am now using V1.3.7.
